targets.expr: count(container_last_seen{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
time() - container_last_seen{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}
sum by (instance, name) (irate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}
time() - container_start_time_seconds{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}

panels.description: Total CPU consumed by all containers, normalized by number of cores.

targets.expr: sum(irate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / scalar(sum(machine_cpu_cores{job="$job", instance=~"$instance"}))

panels.title: Container CPU usage

panels.description: Total memory working set consumed by all containers.

targets.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})

panels.title: Container memory usage

targets.expr: sum by (instance, name) (irate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (instance, name) (irate(container_cpu_user_seconds_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: CPU usage by container, user, 1 core = 100%

targets.expr: sum by (instance, name) (irate(container_cpu_system_seconds_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: CPU usage by container, system, 1 core = 100%

targets.expr: sum by (instance, name) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
sum by (instance, name) (container_memory_usage_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
sum by(instance, name) (container_memory_rss{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
sum by (instance, name) (container_memory_cache{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
sum by (instance, name) (container_memory_swap{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""})
sum by(instance, name) (irate(container_oom_events_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by(name, instance) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by(name, instance) (rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by(name, instance) (rate(container_fs_reads_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by(name, instance) (rate(container_fs_writes_total{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", name=~"$name", name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
